CVE-2019-19721.title: An off-by-one error in the DecodeBlock function in codec/sdl_imag ...
CVE-2019-19721.summary: An off-by-one error in the DecodeBlock function in codec/sdl_image.c in VideoLAN VLC media player before 3.0.9 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (memory corruption) via a crafted image file. NOTE: this may be related to the SDL_Image product.

CVE-2020-13428.title: A heap-based buffer overflow in the hxxx_AnnexB_to_xVC function i ...
CVE-2020-13428.summary: A heap-based buffer overflow in the hxxx_AnnexB_to_xVC function in modules/packetizer/hxxx_nal.c in VideoLAN VLC media player before 3.0.11 for macOS/iOS allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (application crash) or execute arbitrary code via a crafted H.264 Annex-B video (.avi for example) file.

CVE-2020-26664.title: A vulnerability in EbmlTypeDispatcher::send in VideoLAN VLC media ...
CVE-2020-26664.summary: A vulnerability in EbmlTypeDispatcher::send in VideoLAN VLC media player 3.0.11 allows attackers to trigger a heap-based buffer overflow via a crafted .mkv file.

CVE-2021-25801.title: A buffer overflow vulnerability in the __Parse_indx component of  ...
CVE-2021-25801.summary: A buffer overflow vulnerability in the __Parse_indx component of VideoLAN VLC Media Player 3.0.11 allows attackers to cause an out-of-bounds read via a crafted .avi file.

CVE-2021-25802.title: A buffer overflow vulnerability in the AVI_ExtractSubtitle compon ...
CVE-2021-25802.summary: A buffer overflow vulnerability in the AVI_ExtractSubtitle component of VideoLAN VLC Media Player 3.0.11 allows attackers to cause an out-of-bounds read via a crafted .avi file.

CVE-2021-25803.title: A buffer overflow vulnerability in the vlc_input_attachment_New c ...
CVE-2021-25803.summary: A buffer overflow vulnerability in the vlc_input_attachment_New component of VideoLAN VLC Media Player 3.0.11 allows attackers to cause an out-of-bounds read via a crafted .avi file.

CVE-2021-25804.title: A NULL-pointer dereference in "Open" in avi.c of VideoLAN VLC Med ...
CVE-2021-25804.summary: A NULL-pointer dereference in "Open" in avi.c of VideoLAN VLC Media Player 3.0.11 can a denial of service (DOS) in the application.

CVE-2022-41325.title: An integer overflow in the VNC module in VideoLAN VLC Media Playe ...
CVE-2022-41325.summary: An integer overflow in the VNC module in VideoLAN VLC Media Player through 3.0.17.4 allows attackers, by tricking a user into opening a crafted playlist or connecting to a rogue VNC server, to crash VLC or execute code under some conditions.

CVE-2023-47359.title: Videolan VLC prior to version 3.0.20 contains an incorrect offset ...
CVE-2023-47359.summary: Videolan VLC prior to version 3.0.20 contains an incorrect offset read that leads to a Heap-Based Buffer Overflow in function GetPacket() and results in a memory corruption.

CVE-2023-47360.summary: Videolan VLC prior to version 3.0.20 contains an Integer underflow that leads to an incorrect packet length.
